title: olea europaea subsp. guanchica
intro: Olea europaea subsp. guanchica, also known as the Canary Islands olive tree, is a subspecies of the olive tree native to the Canary Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Olea europaea subsp. guanchica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is also used as a component in traditional Canarian medicine.
